task_completion.description: Configure Screaming Frog Custom Search with the three required rules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog 'Custom Search' configuration window is visible, showing three active rules: 'Buy Button' (Contains 'Add to basket'), 'Availability' (Contains 'In stock'), and 'Price Format' (Regex '£[0-9]+\.[0-9]{2}').
Main Screaming Frog UI shows 'https://books.toscrape.com/' in the URL bar at the top, and the crawl progress bar indicates active crawling or 100% completion.

task_completion.description: View the populated Custom Search results in the Screaming Frog UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Custom Search' tab is selected in the Screaming Frog interface, displaying populated rows of URLs that matched the configured search rules.

task_completion.description: Export the Custom Search results to the specified CSV path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal window showing the file 'custom_search_results.csv' being saved or existing in the directory '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' (or '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/').

task_completion.description: Write a summary report containing page counts, pattern counts, and recommendations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of 'content_quality_report.txt' in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'. The text must explicitly include a total page count, counts for the search patterns (Buy Button, Availability, Price Format), and written recommendations.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the actual Screaming Frog application window, rather than terminal commands or scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: The CSV export was generated by Screaming Frog, not manually mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the Screaming Frog 'Export' button being used or a 'Save As' dialog originating from Screaming Frog, rather than manually creating a CSV file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The summary report contains realistic data derived from the actual crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report text contains actual numbers (e.g., hundreds of pages, multiple matches) rather than placeholder text like 'X pages found' or 'Insert count here'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Custom Search rules must be: 'Buy Button' (Contains text 'Add to basket'), 'Availability' (Contains text 'In stock'), and 'Price Format' (Regex '£[0-9]+\.[0-9]{2}'). The CSV export must be located at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/custom_search_results.csv and should contain at least 20 rows of data. The summary report must be located at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/content_quality_report.txt.
